caption: In a black-and-white scene, a man wearing glasses, a dark t-shirt, and bracelets on both wrists reacts with surprise. He is positioned in front of a framed piece of art featuring a graphic with the number "20" and the word "SANDER" partially visible. A decorated tree stands to the left of the frame. The man holds a white piece of paper or a small white object in his right hand. Initially, he holds the object up near his head with his mouth open in a shocked expression. As the sequence progresses, he brings the white object closer to his face, eventually covering his eyes and nose with it while maintaining his open-mouthed expression of astonishment. His arms move from being raised beside his head to crossing in front of his face as he reacts to something off-screen.
